transcript.text:
[A delicious sound of boiling soup]
Can I get 10 servings?
[What did you say?]
I mean, sure
[Nakji Dak-Galbi (Spicy Webfoot Octopus & Chicken)]
[No way!]
[She's the one that ordered this btw]
It should be Seoul's biggest iron plate
47cm in diameter
[Huge Iron Pot]
[I love it]
[She can't eat all of it]
[You must not know me then]
Only this much left? When did I eat it all?
[Ha.. ha.. ha.. ha...]
Hello everyone

I'm here at Junggok-dong today
To eat Dak-galbi (spicy chicken with vegetables)
They've been in business for 23 years!
It's really been a while since I had dak-galbi
[Chuncheon Gol Dak Nakji Galbi] [Gwangjin, Junggok-dong]
Hello!
Mmm it smells good
I love the smell
I'm nervous
The plate is huge
This has to be the biggest one I've seen
They have boneless dak-galbi (chicken) and nakji (webfoot octopus) dak-galbi
Should I get the nakji? It'll be so good
Excuse me, Up to how many servings can I fit in here?
[What kind of question is that?]
Order 2 servings then How many are you going to order?

I eat a lot
Up to how many servings?
[I've never thought about it]
We've done 7 servings
Can I fit more?
[This lady over here...]
7 servings will fill it up
Can I do 10 servings?
10 servings?!
I mean... sure
-Just 2 servings of vegetables though -Alright
[I got you]
It's way too much for 1 person
[2 servings of vegetables as promised]
[Dak-galbi in! (chicken)]
[Nakji as well! (webfoot octopus)]

[This is Nakji Dak-galbi]
That's a lot
[Let's go!]
That's a lot of food!
This should be like 11 servings I put in a lot
Really? Thank you
[How we play the waiting game]
How long do I need to wait? Does it take long?
It'll take 20 minutes
[Right.. since it's 10 servings]
[I'm falling in love]
That's a big one
Perilla leaves go in after it's cooked
[Eating the side dishes as she waits]
I'm hungry
I've done up to 7 servings

First time making 10 servings?
[Of course]
It must be this high if I included the veggies too
[He made sure to pack it with chicken and octopus instead of veggies]
[What a sighting]
[With perilla leaves]
[Visuals that call for an exclamation]
My daughter asked me how many servings you ordered So I told her "about 10"
And she said "that won't be enough for her" [Precisely...]
Perilla leaf
-Can I stir and start eating now? -Yes
[It's been a long wait. Let's eat up now]
[The visuals...]
Let's turn down the fire
[The owner is so funny!]
Welcome~

[Thank you sir!]
It has shrimp, rice cake, sweet potatoes, webfoot octopus, chicken
[And a lot more!]
Bon appetit!
Some sauce first
Tasty!
The sauce is strong
It has a hint of seafood flavor
Chicken
Ta-da
The meat is very tender and chewy
It just disappeared in my mouth
Rice cake!
You can choose to get either flour or rice
Shrimp just like this
On a lettuce leaf

Garlic, pickled radish
It's great with radish
Wrap it
The sauce is very addicting
Perilla leaf
This is a must for this dish
Nakji too
Both of them together
The meat flavors and the chewiness of the octopus is very delicious
I thought it'd be weird, but it's great
Their kimchi tastes really good
Put 1 on top
Kimchi dak-galbi
This sauce is magical
The initial taste is not salty
It's savory

It's great just the way it is
Let's eat 1 as a whole
Radish goes so well with this
[Chicken]
[Webfoot Octopus]
[Shrimp]
[Sweet Potato]
Looks good, right?
They're all in here
Delicious
Eating the sweet potato together is yummy
[I must get this on film]
[She's a professional]
This is different from other dak-galbi dishes
The flavors are strong, but not salty
[A fan giving her a gift]

[Thank you very much]
I've received drinks Thank you!
Lovely
You're famous
Nice to meet you
Shrimp in here first
Chicken
Webfoot octopus
Sweet potato
[Another fan is here]
Take a photo
They were outside sneaking in a photo of you
[He's acting as her manager for today]
[Take lots of photos of Tzuyang!]
[So touched!]
This iron plate is really big Bigger than other places, right?

47cm in diameter
It's gotta be Seoul's biggest iron plate
It's really huge
[And this person filled it up for a meal]
With some radish
Stir it up real quick
Nakji
2nd one
Let's slurp it
[I'm the happiest when I eat]
[She won't say a word when the food is good]
I see the bottom now
[Where did it all go?]
Wrap it like this with radish
[Inhaling the food]
[It's just me and dak-galbi in this world]

I'm too busy eating to talk
It was good at first too, but eating it all cooked up like this is the real deal
[Get big scoops]
[And eat it non-stop]
The consistency gets thicker and thicker
It's all mixed up well too
Only this much left? When did I eat it all?
The ones that are left last are the best
This looks like some kind of a porridge
[It's that thick]
[Scraping the bottom]
It looks tattered from getting cooked too much
[She really isn't saying much this mukbang]
Last bite!
[All cleared!]
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
